title: KB enabled as the project's operating memory
content: This project uses a local-first KB as the persistent home for decisions, premises, facts, pendencias, and learnings. Chat history is not the source of truth.

title: Initial project scope remains valid until first KB review
content: The initial scope approved by the sponsor stays active until the first explicit KB review cycle revisits it.
tier_reason: High impact premise that should influence early sessions.

title: The primary runtime is local-first
content: The project operates from local files and Git. The KB runtime must work without external services or pip-installed dependencies.
tier_reason: Stable architecture fact that is useful on demand.

title: Review HOT criteria after first real sessions
content: After the first real work sessions, review whether HOT remains selective and move records if drift appears.

title: Search before assuming reduces context drift
content: When the agent checks the KB before inferring, it is less likely to mix fact, premise, and chat memory.
tier_reason: Operational lesson that should shape every session.
